checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: GEN-012 validation pass: 26 node tests passed, MDE files parsed, 14 traceability files checked, fixture index check passed, and fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: live coverage-rerank evaluation
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-live-coverage-rerank-gen012.json records MAP 0.2531, nDCG@10 0.3095, Precision@10 0.2502, Recall@10 0.4283, MRR 0.5520 over 225 live Cranfield queries.

checks.name: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-comparison-gen012.json
checks.evidence: Comparison artifact records coverage-rerank as candidate_improved_core_metrics with +0.0100 nDCG@10 over baseline and +0.0073 nDCG@10 over field-sum.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-012 leaves the public default unchanged.

high_findings.summary: Coverage-rerank remains candidate-only until BEIR transferability is measured.

evidence_quality: Live candidate evidence improved over baseline and field-sum, but remains Cranfield-only and must not be promoted without transferability evidence.
